capabilities_used.evidence: 反复用“this cycle / bull run / recovery”框架表达仓位与预期，例如“June Will Be Bullish For Crypto.”、“The Bull Run Is Just Getting Started.”、“Top Memecoins Will Recover In 2026.”，明显按周期阶段而不是单次交易来叙事。
长期周期叙事非常强：“You Have To HODL Until 2030”、“Expecting a BIG recovery for crypto in 2026.”、“Forever Bullish On Crypto.”，体现典型多周期持有框架。
他核心押注不是大盘 beta，而是 meme 轮动与山寨季思路：“Top Memecoins Will Outperform Top Altcoins This Cycle.”、“Memecoins Are The Future.”、“Memecoins Ready To Giga Send.”，说明其框架是资金从主流币向 meme/cult 币扩散。
会把 ETF 上线/资金流作为行情催化：“Hong Kong Spot #Bitcoin & #Ethereum ETF Trading Is Now Live.”，并配合“Hong Kong About To Pump Our Bags.”做方向判断。
会跟踪美联储和利率语境：“FED OBSERVES MILDLY HIGH BUT EASING INFLATION... Policy May Adjust Based On Incoming Data”，虽然不是深度宏观，但会拿宏观事件做情绪与仓位背景。
默认把市场读成强多头 regime：“Stop Panicking: The #BullRun Is Here.”、“Welcome To The Most Glorious Bull Run Of Our Generation.”、“$BTC Looks Primed To Send.”。
他会把盘整视为下一段上涨前奏：“Consolidation Here. Pump Incoming.”；图 5 也是典型低位横盘后突然垂直拉升的示意，更像箱体整理后延续。
图 5 用非常简化的方式画出“横盘整理后继续喷发”的结构，推文“Consolidation Here. Pump Incoming.”与多头旗形/延续思路一致，尽管他表达更 meme 化而非严格教科书 TA。
虽然总体极度看多，但在 2026 回撤环境里写过“My Strategy In 2026: Practice patience - Wait for markets to crash - DCA into top alts + memes”，说明他至少口头上承认要等崩完再分批，而不是直接接飞刀。
他多次把市场描述为“wild ride”并强调“all you need to do is survive”，说明知道高波动阶段核心任务是活下来，但没有形成严格的波动率规则。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Memecoin Cult Strength Filter
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: Meme 币社群信仰强度筛选
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Ranks tokens by cult-like community cohesion, slogan density, identity signaling, and holder willingness to hold through volatility rather than by fundamentals.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 按社群凝聚力、口号传播、身份认同和持币者穿越波动的意愿来筛选标的，而不是按基本面筛选。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: “$SPX Is The Only Cult Worth Joining.”、“Believe In Something.”、“Diamond Hands Will Win Big This Cycle”、“$ASTER CODED.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Calendar Month Pump Seasonality
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Uses specific months or calendar windows as directional bullish catalysts for crypto or memecoins without requiring deep chart confirmation.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把特定月份或日历窗口直接当作行情催化，先给出方向性看涨判断，图表确认反而是次要的。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: “June Will Be Bullish For Crypto.”、“Crypto Will Pump In September.”、“PUMPTOBER.”、“Which Memecoin Will Pump In June?!”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Bull Run Diamond-Hands Hold
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Instead of actively trading around volatility, concentrate into a few high-conviction meme names and hold through the main bull phase until extreme market cap expansion.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 不围绕波动频繁交易，而是集中押注少数高信念 meme 币，穿越主升浪，直到市值极端扩张才考虑兑现。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: “I saw a man turn 50k into 40m+ in 2021... held till the peak... didn't sell a dollar until the project reached a 5 billion+ market cap.” 以及“LEARN TO HODL = LEARN TO WIN.”

personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 少做频繁交易，多做叙事与信仰驱动的持有。

personal_quirks.quote: LEARN TO HODL = LEARN TO WIN.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 胜率核心不是择时，而是拿得住高弹性标的。

personal_quirks.quote: Diamond Hands Will Win Big This Cycle
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 在牛市阶段，兑现过早比扛波动更伤收益。

personal_quirks.quote: My Strategy In 2026: - Practice patience - Wait for markets to crash - DCA into top alts + memes - Go in HEAVY on $BTC, $ASTER, $PEPE & $SUI
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 大跌后分批吸筹，但一旦看对方向就会重仓进攻。
他的公开人格以 HODL 为主，但也承认获利了结的重要性，说明其内部其实存在“信仰持有”和“兑现纪律”的张力。

unique_traits: 他和典型 TA 交易员最大的区别，是把“meme 社群强度 + 牛市周期叙事 + 极高持有信念”放在图表细节之前。图片里大量是 PEPE、BRETT、ASTER 这类符号化品牌，而不是标准指标截图，说明他更像用内容、符号和叙事做交易框架。真正的技术分析在他这里更接近“盘整后继续喷”“牛市阶段别下车”的简化模板，而非精细化执行系统。
